title: move_to_pos_tile command
description: Move to specific tile position on the current map.
markdownDescription: *Move* to specific tile position on the current map.

prefixItems.title: move_to_pos_tile command
prefixItems.description: Move to specific tile position on the current map.
prefixItems.markdownDescription: *Move* to specific tile position on the current map.

prefixItems.title: move_to_pos_tile command parameters
prefixItems.description: pos (required), proximity_px (optional), max_time_s (optional), change_dir_ms (optional), dt_comp (optional), absolute (optional)

proximity_px.title: Proximity in px
proximity_px.description: How close to come to the target position in px
proximity_px.markdownDescription: How close to come to the target position in px

max_time_s.title: Maximum time (in sec) to reach the position
max_time_s.description: Maximum time (in sec) to reach the position. After this time the movement stops.
max_time_s.markdownDescription: Maximum time (in sec) to reach the position. After this time the movement stops.

change_dir_ms.title: Change Direction after ms
change_dir_ms.description: Keep the movement direction unchanged for given time (in mx)
change_dir_ms.markdownDescription: Keep the movement direction unchanged for given time (in mx)

dt_comp.title: Delta-time Compensation
dt_comp.description: Specifies if the movement is compensated by current framerate. Default is True
dt_comp.markdownDescription: Specifies if the movement is compensated by current framerate. Default is `true`

absolute.title: Do not apply velocity on the movement
absolute.description: Specifies if the movement is adjusted using velocity. Default is True
absolute.markdownDescription: Specifies if the movement is adjusted using velocity. Default is `true`
